servinfo.title: Forward and Reverse Clutch Assembly Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Forward and Reverse Clutch Assembly Disassembly and Reassembly

servinfosub.title: Clutch Disc, Separator Plate and Retaining Plate
servinfosub.ptxt: Check that sliding surfaces of clutch discs, separator plate and retaining plates are not worn hard or burnt.

attention3.ptxt: If disc lining is exfoliated or discolored, replace all discs.

servinfosub.title: Forward Clutch Return Spring Subassembly
servinfosub.ptxt: Measure free length of forward clutch return spring.
If measured length is out of reference value greatly, replace forward and reverse clutch assembly.

item.ptxt: Do not apply excessive force when measuring spring free length.

spec.title: Reference free length of forward clutch return spring

servinfosub.title: Forward Clutch Piston Lip and Forward Clutch Balancer Lip
servinfosub.ptxt: Check each lip for wear, deformation, cut and/or hardening. If necessary, replace.

servinfosub.title: Forward Clutch Drum Lip
servinfosub.ptxt: Check its lip for wear, deformation, cut and/or hardening. If necessary, replace.
